title: microchilus simplex
intro: Microchilus simplex, also known as the 'Yellow Formosa Orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and infections. The health benefits of Microchilus simplex include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Microchilus simplex can be used in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
